summary: Iteration 4 retest - ALL PRIORITY ITEMS PASS. Backend pytest 22/22 PASS (was 18/19 in iter3). Critical Stripe status fix verified: GET /api/payments/status/{session_id} now returns 200 (DB fallback when Emergent proxy 404s on read), POST /api/payments/confirm/{session_id} marks purchase 'paid', and a subsequent status call returns payment_status='paid', status='complete'. All previously-failing endpoints re-verified: /chat (real Claude reply ~5s), /profile/extract (GPT JSON), /jobs/match (sorted by match_score), /interview/start + /answer (full 2- & 3-question round-trips with structured 5-axis scores + summary), /voice/status (enabled=false, 3 voices), /voice/tts (501), /payments/checkout (returns Stripe checkout.stripe.com URL + cs_test_ session_id). Frontend: home loads with all 4 testIDs (install-btn, avatar-maya/sofia/aria), tapping avatar-sofia routes to /chat with chat-input visible (Sofia 'typing...' while real Claude generates intro). /results?interview_id={completed_2q_interview} renders the radar chart correctly: SVG with 5 grid polygons + filled performance polygon, all 5 axis labels (STAR, Clarity, Confidence, Depth, Structure), per-axis numeric legend, overall score (85/100), verdict ('Promising'), summary text, strengths/improvements pillboxes, and results-restart + results-close testIDs both functional. /checkout renders pay-btn correctly when invoked with full params.

issues: Pre-existing 'shadow*' style props deprecation warnings on web (cosmetic, non-blocking)

action_items: (Low priority) Expo doctor reports version drift: react-native-svg@15.15.4 vs expected 15.12.1, async-storage@3.0.2 vs 2.2.0, expo-linear-gradient@55.0.13 vs ~15.0.8. Currently functional but main agent may want to align for Expo SDK compatibility.

(Low priority) /api/payments/status still hits the Emergent proxy first and logs a 404 every call before falling back. Consider short-circuiting when STRIPE_API_KEY=='sk_test_emergent' to avoid noisy logs and one extra ~200ms RTT per poll.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: payments_status fallback is well-contained inside try/except, logs at INFO, returns sensible status='complete' when DB shows paid. Good.
payments_confirm is idempotent (only updates if status != paid) and 404s correctly when purchase doesn't exist. Good.
results.tsx radar chart is a clean self-contained SVG component (~40 lines for the chart math); legend + pillbox + nextSteps gracefully degrade when summary fields are absent.

Minor: checkout.tsx reads avatar/title/price from URL params (default to 'maya'/£0.00) rather than fetching from the catalog API by item_id. Direct deep-links to /checkout?item_id=X without the other params show £0.00 + the wrong avatar. Not a regression; main agent may want to fall back to a GET /api/catalog/{item_id} lookup for robustness.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration3.py (added test_payments_status_unknown_404, test_payments_confirm_marks_paid, test_payments_confirm_unknown_404; relaxed payment_status enum to include 'pending')

success_rate.frontend: 100% on tested flows (home load + sofia chat route + results radar render + checkout pay-btn)

seed_data_creation: Test interview (2 questions, completed, scored): interview_id=8751f08f-1c7a-4970-ae77-76d451b4a6eb under user_id 'TEST_iter4_ui'. pytest also seeded 1 chat session, 1 profile, 1 3-question interview, 2 stripe sessions, 1 saved-job (auto-deleted) under user_id 'TEST_iter3_user'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 4 confirms the full Iteration 3 backlog is GREEN. Backend regression suite at /app/backend/tests/test_iteration3.py covers 22 cases including Stripe DB-fallback + confirm flow (~26s wall time). For UI smoke: home -> avatar-sofia -> chat (typing… ~5-7s) -> chat-start-interview, and /results?interview_id={any_completed_interview} for radar. EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=https://career-app-enhance.preview.emergentagent.com.
rca_of_issue: Iter3 bug 'GET /payments/status returns 502' was rooted in emergentintegrations.payments.stripe.checkout.get_checkout_status hitting integrations.emergentagent.com proxy which does not implement the GET /v1/checkout/sessions/{id} read endpoint (returns 404 -> 502 bubble-up). Fix in server.py: try/except around get_checkout_status; on any exception fall back to the local purchases doc keyed by stripe_session_id. New /payments/confirm/{session_id} endpoint is invoked by the success_url redirect on the web client to mark purchase 'paid' (idempotent). Verified via test_payments_confirm_marks_paid: confirm -> status -> payment_status='paid', status='complete', via='db'.
